name: Secrets Scanner
description: Find leaked credentials in files: high-signal provider patterns (AWS/GitHub/Slack/Google/Stripe/OpenAI/SendGrid/Twilio/JWT/PEM private keys) plus a generic high-entropy secret-assignment catch with placeholder filtering. Matches are REDACTED in output — never echoes a full secret. Pure stdlib, read-only.

prerequisites.install_hint: Install Python 3.8+ — pure stdlib, no other dependency.

safety.notes: Read-only. Reads text files and regex/entropy-matches. Redacts secret values in output. Never validates a key against a remote service, imports, or executes anything.

payload.note: Zero-dependency. Provider patterns are specific/high-confidence; the generic catch is entropy-gated + placeholder-filtered to limit noise. Values are redacted (prefix…suffix [len]); private keys report presence only. Emits SECRET.* atoms.
